title: If War Comes Tomorrow
director: Lazar Antsi-Polovskiy, Georgiy Beryozko, Efim Dzigan
writer: Efim Dzigan, Mikhail Svetlov, Georgiy Beryozko
actors: Inna Fyodorova, Vsevolod Sanaev, Serafim Kozminskiy
plot: The Soviet Army, taken by surprise in this imaginary scenario by an attack, immediately routs the invaders and then crosses the border into the enemy territory in hot pursuit, culminating in a military apotheosis.
